title: The ULTIMATE Festive Mod
description: it adds festive holiday items from multiple holidays such as Christmas, Halloween, Easter and MORE!
body:
**_WARNING THIS MOD HAS STOPPED DEVELOPMENT SINCE I LOST THE PROJECT_**



![The Title Of This Mod!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6787acf9528c9ec445c4b9c6cb31c00ff4b3e2f8.png)

# This mod adds all sorts of festive items! including christmas items, halloween items, easter items and MORE!

**Planned holidays!**
<details> 
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**The planned holidays are:**
- Christmas
- Easter
- Halloween
- Thanksgiving
- New Year
- Valentines day
- st. patricks day
- (from the netherlands) Sinterklaas

</details>

**Here are all features added!**

Christmas
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

1. **CHRISTMAS TREES :D**
 ![a combination of fully decorated christmas trees](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79f261d56b0e4acfb15c877952ce96d81dda48cf.png)

2. **AND A ADVENT CALENDAR!!**
 ![AN ADVENT CALENDAR!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95f2b39f614b406db5a43b706ec2045da5d57a5f.png)
   
3. **CANDY CANES AND PEPPERMINTS!**
![candy canes and peppermints](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a23ec44ff68308f1c947a45e3db895bbc238625.png)
 
4. **HOT CHOCOLATE!**
![HOT CHOCOLATE!!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01d92330f3a4de6349b9a44965d29625e7aecb8d.png)

5. **CHRISTMAS LIGHTS!!**
![Christmas lights!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b6879d407a03e5ac30f8188b6e1d1ffc1a60334.png)

6. **STOCKINGS!!**
![STOCKINGS!!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9de3d8a4c2d6766d9d315fdfe0e1681d22a99bf.png)
</details>
